headings.usage: Use for primary app branding, section titles, and modal headers. Banned: Inter, Space Grotesk.

body_and_data.usage: CRITICAL: All numbers, prices, ROIs, and tabular data MUST use IBM Plex Mono to ensure tabular alignment and terminal-like precision.

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Data-heavy dashboards should use border-collapse style layouts with 1px solid structural lines.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights using box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1).
visual_enhancers.radii: Sharp edges. Use `rounded-none` or absolute maximum `rounded-sm` (2px). Never use fully rounded pills for cards.
visual_enhancers.effects: Use 'The Tracing Beam' (linear moving gradient border) strictly for highlighting the absolute best Arbitrage ROI opportunity on the screen.

layouts.global: Sidebar layout, dark-capable. Sidebar should be compact with Lucide icons, expandable. Content area must be a High Density Grid.
layouts.grid_system: Base Grid: `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12`. Tight gaps (`gap-4` or `gap-[1px]` with background bleeding for borders).
layouts.f_pattern: Top-left must contain the North Star Metric (e.g., Live Scanner Status / Total Opportunities). F-Pattern scanning for data.

component_guidelines.tables: Dense and compact. `py-2 px-3` cells. Striped rows (`even:bg-[#141414]`). Right-align all numerical columns. Use `text-xs` or `text-sm`.
component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp (`rounded-none`). High-saturation solid blocks for primary actions, 1px border for secondary. ALWAYS explicitly set hover text color. Example: `hover:bg-[#00B8CC] hover:text-black transition-colors`.
component_guidelines.cards: Cardless or completely flat rectangular panels. `border border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#0A0A0A]`. No shadows.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn based. Dark background `#141414`, subtle border `#2A2A2A`. Focus state MUST use high contrast: `focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-[#00E5FF]`.
component_guidelines.badges: Square. Used for platform tags (Kalshi/Polymarket) and Match Scores.

arbitrage_radar.header: Live market scan progress bar with % complete, and platform market counts (Kalshi: 100, Polymarket: 150).
arbitrage_radar.table: Opportunities table. Columns: Market Pair, Kalshi YES, Polymarket YES, ROI (neon green if > 0), Match-Score, Legs. Top row highlighted.

manual_calculator.layout: 2-4 columns for platforms (YES prices). Form fields for investment amount and maker/taker fees.
manual_calculator.output: Profit scenarios presented in a high-contrast panel. Highlight net profit clearly.

watchlist.layout: List view. Includes ROI alert thresholds. Include subtle 'pulse' animation for active alerts.

whale_tracker.layout: Leaderboard table. Columns: Wallet, 24h PnL, Win Rate. Use monospaced numbers.

scan_log_stream.layout: Terminal-style auto-scrolling container at the bottom or side. `font-mono text-[10px] text-[#00FF66] bg-black border border-[#2A2A2A] p-4`.

motion.micro_interactions: Framer motion for value changes. If a price updates, flash the cell background `bg-[rgba(0,255,102,0.2)]` for 300ms before fading to transparent.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties: `transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out` or `transition-transform`. Never `transition-all`.

accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds MUST meet APCA or WCAG AA standard. Minimal 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (`focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#00E5FF]`).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="calc-investment-input"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-density, Bloomberg-grade crypto trading dashboard.
Prioritize text alignment and data legibility over spacing. Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural grids, and highly customized Shadcn components for interactive pieces.
All numbers MUST use the monospace font family (IBM Plex Mono).
NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds on elements that overlap content. Always use flat solid dark backgrounds (#141414).
Ensure the scan log stream feels like a real CLI output.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop'.
No generic centered layouts. Left-align data and text.
No emojis for icons. Use `lucide-react` exclusively.
Include hover/active states for EVERY interactive element.
